title: Four-year-old girl killed after goods vehicle rams scooter in Kannur
content: Kannur: A four-year-old girl was killed after a goods vehicle rammed into a scooter parked near Pavannur Kadavu mosque in Kuttiattoor panchayat. Tashreefa, daughter of P K Mohammed Sajid and M K Maimoonath of Kuttikkunnummal, was sitting with her parents on the scooter parked by the roadside when the goods vehicle crashed into it. The accident occurred around 9 pm on Thursday. Though the child was rushed to a hospital, her life could not be saved. Sajid and Maimoonath, who sustained serious injuries in the accident, are undergoing treatment at a private hospital in Kannur. Tashreefa had recently been admitted to LKG at Pavannur ALP School and was set to begin her schooling soon.
